description: Jobtome is a job search and aggregation service that helps users find vacancies and receive personalized job recommendations. Its public website is focused on browsing and searching job listings across locations and categories.
summary: Jobtome exposes a public MCP server for job search at https://mcp.jobtome.com/mcp; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI integration surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: Job Search by Jobtome MCP Server
